\tzpentry{ID3544}{Drho Quantum Density Evolution Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3544 introduces Drho Quantum Density Evolution Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \frac{d\rho}{dt}=-\frac{i}{\hbar}[H_{\rm eff},\rho]+\mathcal{D}[\rho], \]
